method: Official product, documentation, support, and upstream repository pages only. Marketing claims are recorded as vendor claims, not independently verified outcomes.

products.name: Dehancer
products.corePromise: Film emulation with film profiles, grain, halation, bloom, and camera Log profiles.
products.colorManagement: Camera profiles and host-specific workflows; exact transform behavior depends on product edition.
products.styleLibrary: Vendor states 60+ film profiles.
products.lutExport: LUT Generator is limited in trial and available in qualifying paid licenses.
products.privacy: Desktop/plugin processing is local; web edition behavior is separate.
products.pricing: Subscription and lifetime options; official individual page lists Mobile $6/month, Photo $13/month, Photo & Video $29/month at retrieval time.
products.freeLimit: Demo watermark; LUT Generator disabled unless the license includes it.
weaknesses: product and license variants can be difficult to compare
learn: separate film character from technical input
doNotCopy: dense expert-first control surface in the default path

products.name: FilmConvert Nitrate
products.corePromise: Camera-aware film stock emulation with grain and optional halation.
products.colorManagement: User selects camera make, model, and profile before creative film controls.
products.styleLibrary: Film stock emulations.
products.lutExport: Available as part of its film-response workflow.
products.pricing: One-time purchase: official purchase page listed $119 per host and $179 all-platform bundle at retrieval time.
learn: ask camera/profile before applying a look
doNotCopy: make unsupported camera selection look authoritative

products.name: CineMatch
products.corePromise: Match footage from different camera sensors and color sciences.
products.colorManagement: Sensor Match plus color-space transform workflow.
products.styleLibrary: No general creative library; camera looks are the target.
products.lutExport: 3D LUT generator for monitoring and camera-look matching.
products.pricing: Paid single-machine license; current public terms confirm 12 months of camera-pack updates but pricing varies by storefront.
weaknesses: sensor claims are difficult for users to independently verify
doNotCopy: describe heuristic matching as sensor calibration

products.name: Colourlab AI
products.corePromise: On-device automated balancing, shot matching, and look creation.
products.colorManagement: Automated color management with professional integrations in Pro.
products.cameraProfiles: Vendor states built-in RAW support for 40+ camera brands.
products.styleLibrary: Neural Looks and Look Designer ecosystem.
products.lutExport: Look creation and host integration; exact export availability is edition-dependent.
products.privacy: Vendor states processing runs entirely on the device.
products.pricing: Creator and Pro tiers; current price was not exposed in the retrieved public feature page.
products.freeLimit: Free trial without credit card advertised.
doNotCopy: promise professional judgment without inspectable diagnostics

products.name: fylm.ai
products.corePromise: Browser-based color-managed grading, reference matching, and LUT export.
products.colorManagement: ACEScct with explicit IDT, LMT, and ODT export choices.
products.cameraProfiles: ACES input transforms and camera-tailored exports.
products.styleLibrary: Lutify.me packs and user grades.
products.lutExport: .cube, XMP, ICC, and Capture One style export.
products.privacy: Cloud product; Lite stores edits locally according to pricing FAQ.
products.pricing: Free and paid plans; Lite was listed at $84/year on the associated official pricing page.
products.freeLimit: Free plan available; exact quotas depend on current plan table.
weaknesses: cloud upload may deter privacy-sensitive users
learn: explain what is baked into the LUT
doNotCopy: put IDT/ODT toggles in a beginner-first export screen

products.name: Lutify.me
products.corePromise: Scene-referred LUT packs with a browser previewer and multiple export flavors.
products.colorManagement: Provides camera flavors and ACES-specific workflow documentation.
products.styleLibrary: Commercial packs across film, commercial, warm/cold, and monochrome categories.
products.lutExport: .cube plus XMP/ICC through fylm.ai Lite.
products.privacy: Lite stores edits locally; legacy previewer is SaaS.
products.pricing: $84/year Lite, $99 one-time all-pack add-on, and legacy $59 first year/$19.90 renewals at retrieval time.
products.freeLimit: Free account and free scene-referred LUTs advertised.
weaknesses: large pack choice does not solve selection
doNotCopy: make users choose among dozens of packs without comparison

products.name: 3D LUT Creator
products.corePromise: Direct manipulation of hue, saturation, luminance, and LUT grids with professional export.
products.colorManagement: Advanced Log/RAW and target workflows in higher editions.
products.cameraProfiles: Not positioned as a camera-profile subscription.
products.styleLibrary: Look manager and separate LUT store.
products.lutExport: 3D LUT export; maximum size 33 in Standard/Grading and 96 in Pro.
products.pricing: $99 Grading, $199 Standard, $249 Professional at retrieval time.
products.freeLimit: Try-all-features demo; free grading-related companion plugins are separate.
learn: visual manipulation can be more understandable than numeric controls
doNotCopy: expose the complete professional surface to first-time users

products.name: Retouch4me Color Match
products.corePromise: Match the color scheme of a reference image and export a LUT.
products.colorManagement: Public storefront does not describe a scene-referred contract.
products.styleLibrary: Access to LUT Cloud.
products.lutExport: LUT export for still and video use.
products.privacy: Desktop/plugin processing; storefront also offers unrelated cloud products.
products.pricing: $145 desktop/Photoshop and $124 per video host at retrieval time.
doNotCopy: hide color-management assumptions

products.name: DaVinci Resolve
products.corePromise: Integrated editing, color correction, VFX, and audio with professional color management.
products.colorManagement: YRGB, Resolve Color Management, ACES, CST, input/output transforms.
products.cameraProfiles: Broad built-in camera and RAW support.
products.styleLibrary: Built-in film-look LUTs, gallery stills, PowerGrades, third-party LUTs.
products.lutExport: LUT generation and extensive LUT management.
products.privacy: Local media processing unless cloud features are chosen.
products.pricing: Free edition and $295 Studio at retrieval time.
products.freeLimit: Free edition omits selected Studio features.
weaknesses: terminology and node order are difficult for beginners
learn: give exact node placement after export
separate technical normalization from creative look
doNotCopy: recreate a full NLE inside the browser

products.name: Adobe Premiere Pro Lumetri Color
products.corePromise: Color correction and grading directly on the editing timeline.
products.colorManagement: Color-space-aware sequences, media interpretation, input LUTs, Creative Looks.
products.cameraProfiles: Automatic media color-space handling plus custom input LUTs.
products.styleLibrary: Lumetri Looks and presets.
products.lutExport: Lumetri grade export to .cube is available with transform limitations.
products.privacy: Local editing; Creative Cloud services are optional parts of the product ecosystem.
products.pricing: Subscription; current regional price not recorded because it varies by plan and locale.
weaknesses: Input LUT versus Creative Look ambiguity
doNotCopy: use the same word LUT for unrelated pipeline positions without explanation

products.name: Final Cut Pro Custom LUT
products.corePromise: Separate camera log conversion LUTs from creative custom LUT effects.
products.colorManagement: Camera LUTs at media level; custom LUTs as clip effects with explicit input/output choices.
products.cameraProfiles: Built-in metadata-aware camera LUTs plus custom camera LUT import.
products.styleLibrary: Third-party and user custom LUTs.
products.lutExport: Imports rather than authors LUTs.
products.pricing: Paid Mac application; current regional price not recorded.
products.freeLimit: Trial availability depends on Apple’s current offering.
weaknesses: users still need correct LUT input/output knowledge
learn: adopt the camera-LUT versus creative-LUT vocabulary
doNotCopy: assume metadata always identifies the source correctly

products.name: Panasonic LUMIX REAL TIME LUT
products.corePromise: Apply and create looks for in-camera photo/video output with LUMIX Lab.
products.colorManagement: Camera-specific real-time application; supported capabilities depend on camera model.
products.styleLibrary: Creator LUTs and app-managed looks.
products.lutExport: App/camera workflow rather than general desktop authoring.
products.privacy: Camera/app workflow; cloud behavior was not assessed.
products.pricing: Included with compatible hardware/app.
weaknesses: creative convenience can obscure technical input assumptions
learn: ask intended use: post versus camera monitoring
doNotCopy: claim universal camera compatibility

products.name: ARRI Look Library
products.corePromise: Repeatable on-set and post-production creative looks tied to ARRI LogC workflows.
products.colorManagement: Separate LogC3 and LogC4 assets; look files may carry CDL plus 3D LUT metadata.
products.styleLibrary: 87 looks in themed groups; intensity availability depends on generation.
products.lutExport: Official log-to-log and selected log-to-Rec.709 3D LUT downloads.
products.pricing: Look Library downloads are offered free; camera ownership is separate.
products.freeLimit: Compatibility depends on LogC version and camera.
learn: carry intended input in naming and metadata
doNotCopy: reuse vendor names for original styles

products.name: ARRI Film Lab
products.corePromise: Real-time film-inspired image processing backed by ARRI’s film and digital imaging research.
supportedSoftware: supported post-production hosts through RE:Vision Effects
products.colorManagement: ARRI color pipeline and look-library integration.
products.styleLibrary: Bundled ARRI Look Library plugin.
products.lutExport: Not positioned primarily as a browser LUT authoring tool.
products.pricing: Commercial; price not recorded on the retrieved ARRI overview.
learn: provenance is part of product trust
doNotCopy: claim laboratory-grade film emulation without measurement

products.name: OpenColorIO
products.corePromise: Application-independent color management for motion-picture and VFX pipelines.
products.colorManagement: Configuration-driven transforms compatible with ACES.
products.cameraProfiles: Provided through configurations rather than product-owned camera profiling.
products.styleLibrary: Looks can be defined in configs.
products.lutExport: Supports many LUT and transform formats through tools and integrations.
products.pricing: Free, open source.
doNotCopy: expose OCIO configuration complexity to beginners

products.name: OpenColorIO Config ACES
products.corePromise: Reference ACES configurations and transform validation for OpenColorIO.
products.colorManagement: Strict reference implementation of ACES transforms.
products.cameraProfiles: Includes published input transform color spaces for selected cameras.
products.styleLibrary: Reference gamut compression rather than a consumer style pack.
products.lutExport: Configuration and transform generation assets.
products.pricing: Free, open source.
weaknesses: support list is not a universal camera database
learn: technical support must be evidence and version based
doNotCopy: label a profile supported merely because a name exists

products.name: Colour Science for Python
products.corePromise: Algorithms and datasets for reproducible color science.
products.colorManagement: Extensive models, conversions, appearance models, and LUT I/O.
products.cameraProfiles: Contains published transfer functions and characterization tools, not a consumer support catalog.
products.styleLibrary: No.
products.lutExport: LUT read, write, apply, and invert capabilities.
products.pricing: Free, BSD-3-Clause.
learn: use published formulas and known-value tests when adding technical transforms
doNotCopy: pull a large scientific dependency into the browser without measured benefit

products.name: OpenImageIO
products.corePromise: Robust format-agnostic image I/O, metadata, processing, and comparison.
products.colorManagement: Works with color-management commands and common RGB image representations.
products.styleLibrary: No.
products.lutExport: Image processing rather than end-user LUT authoring.
products.pricing: Free, Apache-2.0.
learn: use file-level comparison as release evidence
doNotCopy: add native dependencies to the frontend for convenience

products.name: ACES
products.corePromise: Standardized scene-referred interchange, transforms, and delivery across productions.
products.colorManagement: Input transforms, ACES encodings, look transforms, output transforms, AMF, and CLF.
products.styleLibrary: Look Transform specification, not a consumer preset catalog.
products.lutExport: CLF supports chains beyond a single 3D LUT.
products.pricing: Free and open source.
doNotCopy: make users learn ACES to complete a basic creative export

products.name: LUTCalc
products.corePromise: Generate, analyze, and preview camera and exposure LUTs from documented transfer functions.
products.colorManagement: Published gamma and gamut transforms with 1D/3D options.
products.cameraProfiles: Many camera Log curves and monitor outputs.
products.styleLibrary: Creative looks and exposure tools, not a large marketplace.
products.lutExport: Multiple LUT formats including camera monitoring uses.
products.pricing: Free.
learn: show exposure consequences separately from creative style
doNotCopy: make all technical options visible by default

products.name: ARRI Look Library App
products.corePromise: Browse and communicate ARRI looks visually before or during production.
products.colorManagement: Look selection tied to ARRI LogC libraries.
products.styleLibrary: 87 predefined looks in nine groups, with three intensities where supported.
products.lutExport: Discovery app; LUT assets are delivered through ARRI look-file resources.
products.nleIntegration: Communication and selection rather than direct editing integration.
products.privacy: No user-media workflow was identified on the overview page.
products.pricing: App/tool access advertised without a separate price on the overview.
weaknesses: selection app does not solve normalization
learn: comparison and selection can be a separate low-complexity task
doNotCopy: treat preview browsing as proof of cross-camera correctness
